Flaky Test Detector v1.0.5+4761f2060433384c908465b70842f96e9ce07513

Usage: cici <command> [options]

Commands:
  run                        Run flaky test detection on a test assembly
  version                    Show version information                   
  help                       Show help and usage information            

Run Command Options:
  -a, --assembly <path>                              Path to the test       
                                                     assembly (.dll) [      
                                                     required]              
  -f, --filter <filter>                              Filter tests by name   
                                                     (partial match)        
  -r, --repeat <count>                               Number of times to run 
                                                     each test (default: 10)
  --report <formats>                                 Report formats:        
                                                     console, json (default:
                                                     console)               
  -o, --output <dir>                                 Output directory for   
                                                     reports                
  -p, --parallel                                     Run test iterations in 
                                                     parallel               
  --timeout <seconds>                                Test execution timeout 
                                                     (default: 30)          
  -v, --verbose                                      Enable verbose logging 
  -h, --help                                         Show help and usage    
                                                     information            

Examples:
  # Basic usage
  cici run -a MyTests.dll

  # Run each test 20 times with parallel execution
  cici run -a MyTests.dll -r 20 -p

  # Filter specific tests and generate JSON report
  cici run -a MyTests.dll -f "UserTests" --report json -o ./reports

For more information, visit: https://github.com/Taiizor/Cici
Help information displayed
